optimization_analysis.optimized_query:
# Optimized Federated Query using SERVICE clauses
# Each triple pattern is pushed to its most selective endpoint

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8892/sparql/
# Predicates: 6
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/enzymes -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [53 triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/vocab/resource/class/Offer -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [4.8K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drugs -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [4.8K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/targets -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [4.6K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drug_interactions -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [10.1K triples]

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8895/sparql/
# Predicates: 4
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Reaction -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [7.8K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Drug -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [8.1K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Compound -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [14.1K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Enzyme -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [4.1K triples]

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8890/sparql/
# Predicates: 1
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/chebi#Compound -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [50.5K triples]

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8899/sparql/
# Predicates: 3
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://bio2rdf.org/affymetrix_vocabulary:Probeset -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.8M triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://bio2rdf.org/dataset_vocabulary:Endpoint -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1 triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> (http://rdfs.org/ns/void#Dataset -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [2 triples]

optimized_federated_query:
# Smart Federated Query with Class Constraints
# Note: Multiple class interpretations exist but all route to same endpoints
# A single query retrieves all data regardless of class ambiguity

SELECT DISTINCT ?affiliation ?author ?capital ?fullnames ?governmentType ?language ?leaderTitle ?paper ?place ?populationDensity ?proceedingAddress
WHERE {

  SERVICE <http://localhost:8899/sparql/> {
    ?author <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> ?fullnames . # ?author:dataset_vocabulary:Endpoint, ?fullnames:Literal
    ?paper <http://swrc.ontoware.org/ontology#author> ?author .
    ?author <http://swrc.ontoware.org/ontology#affiliation> ?affiliation .
    ?author <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/based_near> ?place .
    ?place <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/capital> ?capital .
    ?place <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/governmentType> ?governmentType .
    ?place <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/language> ?language .
    ?place <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/leaderTitle> ?leaderTitle .
    ?place <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/populationDensity> ?populationDensity .
  }

  # Unknown endpoint (no metadata)
    ?paper <http://data.semanticweb.org/ns/swc/ontology#isPartOf> <http://data.semanticweb.org/conference/iswc/2009/proceedings> .
    <http://data.semanticweb.org/conference/iswc/2009/proceedings> <http://swrc.ontoware.org/ontology#address> ?proceedingAddress .
}
LIMIT 1000
